heading: Definitions
label: 4431 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle B (§§ 811–819) of title VIII of , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of subtitle B to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 114–125section 4301 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs, the Committee on Finance, the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation, and the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Homeland Security, the Committee on Ways and Means, and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 2 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Homeland Security.
